title: lasianthus fordii
intro: Lasianthus fordii is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the Chinese teak, and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus fordii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
